audit_items.proof_trace: All 12 GPv2Order.Data fields are validated: hash check (L128-130) binds appData and all fields via EIP-712 domain-separated hash; explicit checks cover buyToken, receiver (correctly address(this) matching the bid() flow), sellAmount, buyAmount vs oracle-validated current price at current elapsedTime, validTo, feeAmount, kind, partiallyFillable, and balance markers; active auction is confirmed by both s_auctionStarts[sellToken] != 0 and elapsedTime <= auctionDuration; _getAssetPrice(..., true) with withValidation=true reverts on stale/zero for both sell token (L153) and assetOut inside _getAssetOutAmount (BaseAuction L798). Reentrancy guard (L125-127) prevents exploitation via bid() callback. No validation gap found.
